Name: TapeTech Premium Compound Roller with Frame
Short description: Frame CROLL04CG TapeTech drywall joint compound rollers are ideal for applying large amounts of drywall compound on walls and ceilings for finishing large patches and butt joints, or skimming entire walls, ceilings and rooms. They are a great alternative to breaking out a spraye
Description: TapeTech 4" Premium Compound Roller with Frame CROLL04CG TapeTech drywall joint compound rollers are ideal for applying large amounts of drywall compound on walls and ceilings for finishing large patches and butt joints, or skimming entire walls, ceilings and rooms. They are a great alternative to breaking out a sprayer or trying to apply the compound with knives or trowels. Simply apply the joint compound with the TapeTech premium drywall joint compound roller and then skim the area with a TapeTech premium finishing knife for an amazing finish. Key Features: Highest Quality: TapeTech premium drywall joint compound rollers are manufactured in Europe exclusively for TapeTech, using the highest quality reticulated polypropylene nap for great results and long life. Highest Capacity: TapeTech premium drywall joint compound rollers feature an 18mm nap - nearly 50% thicker than other brands with ½” nap – allowing you to apply nearly 50% more compound to the surface between fills compared to other high nap rollers. Highest Coverage: The unique design and manufacturing of TapeTech premium joint compound rollers releases more compound from the nap and onto the surface, providing the highest coverage rate per roller load. Robust Frame Design: TapeTech premium drywall joint compound rollers are designed for use with TapeTech roller frames. Our frames are a full 5/16” thick – stronger than smaller ¼” thick frames on the market. Comfortable Handle: The TapeTech Roller frames feature a comfortable, two-component over molded handle that provides comfortable handling and positive grip, even when wet. Extended Reach: Easily reach most common walls and ceilings using the TapeTech CROLLHAN2 extendable handle. With super secure attachment and lightweight but robust construction, you’ll quickly knock out any wall coverage or skimming job. Ideal for Skimming: The TapeTech premium drywall joint compound rollers are ideal for quickly applying large amounts of compound over patches, butt joints or entire surfaces. The perfect set up for skimming with TapeTech premium finishing knives.

Name: TapeTech Corner Applicator
Short description: TapeTech 7″ Corner Applicator: Streamlined Efficiency for Perfect Corners The TapeTech 7″ Corner Applicator is designed to supply joint compound to Corner Finishers, enabling fast and efficient finishing of internal corners (angles). This versatile drywall corner mud applicator can also be used with Applicator Heads to
Description: TapeTech 7″ Corner Applicator: Streamlined Efficiency for Perfect Corners The TapeTech 7″ Corner Applicator is designed to supply joint compound to Corner Finishers, enabling fast and efficient finishing of internal corners (angles). This versatile drywall corner mud applicator can also be used with Applicator Heads to quickly and cleanly apply joint compound to both internal and external corners, facilitating the installation of paper-faced corner bead. With a stainless steel cone, the TapeTech 7″ Corner Applicator ensures durability and reliability on the job. Key Features Stainless Steel Cone: The applicator features a robust stainless steel cone, which ensures longevity and reliable performance, even with frequent use. Versatile Use: The drywall applicator can be used with the FHTT Fiberglass Handle or the XHTT Extension Handle (both handles are not included). This versatility allows you to choose the best handle for your specific needs and preferences. Multiple Applications: The applicator is compatible with various heads to apply joint compound in different scenarios. Use it with the 16TT to apply joint compound to external corners for paper-faced bead application, or with the 16TT90 to apply joint compound to inside corners for tape application. It also finishes internal corners when used with tapetech corner finisher . Usage and Benefits Using the TapeTech 7″ Corner Applicator is straightforward. Simply attach it to the appropriate handle and applicator head for your task. The ergonomic design ensures comfortable use, even during extended periods. Professionals will appreciate the ability to finish internal corners quickly and efficiently. When used with TapeTech Corner Finishers , the drywall corner applicator delivers a smooth, even layer of compound, reducing the need for additional sanding and touch-ups. Furthermore, the applicator’s compatibility with Applicator Heads allows for seamless application of joint compound to both internal and external corners, making it an invaluable corner drywall tool for installing paper-faced corner bead. This adaptability ensures that you can handle a variety of finishing tasks with ease and precision. User Experience The TapeTech 7″ Corner Applicator is designed with the user in mind. Its lightweight construction and ergonomic handle reduce strain, making it easy to use for extended periods. The precise control over the flow of joint compound allows for consistent results, enhancing the overall quality of your work. Additionally, the stainless steel cone ensures that the joint compound applicator remains durable and reliable, even with frequent use. Compatibility and Versatility The Corner Applicator stands out for its compatibility and versatility. It can be used with a range of TapeTech drywall tools , including different handles and applicator heads, making it a flexible tool for various drywall finishing tasks. This adaptability ensures that you can handle different types of corners with a single, reliable tool. Quality and Durability Constructed from high-quality materials, the TapeTech 7″ Corner Applicator is built to last. It is designed to withstand the demands of professional use, ensuring reliable performance over time. Description: The TapeTech EasyRoll® Adjustable Corner Finisher is used to perfectly feather both joint compound edges of internal corners in one pass. The Corner Finishers can be used for wall-to-wall internal corners or wall-to-ceiling corners. The “adjustable” feature of this tool refers to the ability to control the amount of spring pressure by engaging or disengaging one set of tension springs on the back of the corner finisher. Corner Finishers, also referred to as Angle Finishers or Angle Heads, are attached to a corner applicator (CA07TT or CA08TT) or the 14TT MudRunner® to quickly and professionally finish internal drywall corners. EasyRoll® Adjustable Corner Finishers have wheels to provide the smoothest action on the wall and are spring loaded to help compensate for slightly imperfect corners. Use with the FHTT Fiberglass Handle or the XHTT Extension Handle – not included. Wipes down excess mud in internal corners Finishes inside corners of walls and ceilings

Description: TapeTech MudRunner®: Precision Control for Perfect Corners The TapeTech MudRunner® is a revolutionary tool designed to deliver joint compound to corners with unmatched precision and minimal effort. This innovative applicator, also known as the mud runner drywall tool , makes finishing drywall corners faster and more efficient, ensuring high-quality results every time. A simple twist of the wrist activates the piston, creating a consistent flow of joint compound. Twist it back, and the flow stops immediately, providing exact control over the application. This feature makes it an excellent inside corner mud tool . – High Capacity: The mud runner drywall holds 50% more joint compound than a standard 8″ Corner Applicator and 70% more than a 7″ Corner Applicator. This increased capacity means fewer refills and greater efficiency on the job. – Versatility: This tool is compatible with TapeTech Corner Finishers and Mud Heads, making it versatile for various applications. Whether you’re finishing internal corners or applying compound to internal and external corners for paper-faced corner bead, the mudrunner tapetech handles it all with ease. Usage and Benefits Using the TapeTech MudRunner® is straightforward and intuitive. Simply fill the applicator with joint compound and twist the wrist to activate the flow. The ergonomic design ensures that even with extended use, the tool remains comfortable to handle. Professionals will appreciate the ability to achieve high-quality, finished internal corners quickly. When used with TapeTech Corner Finishers , the drywall mudrunner delivers a smooth, even layer of compound, reducing the need for additional sanding and touch-ups. This tool is also ideal for applying compound to both internal and external corners when installing paper-faced corner bead, ensuring a perfect finish every time. User Experience The mudrunner drywall is designed with the user in mind. Its lightweight construction and ergonomic handle reduce strain, making it easy to use for extended periods. The precise control over the flow of joint compound allows for consistent results, enhancing the overall quality of your work. Additionally, the stainless steel cone ensures that the tape tech mud runner remains durable and reliable, even with frequent use. Compatibility and Versatility The TapeTech MudRunner® stands out for its compatibility and versatility. It can be used with a range of TapeTech accessories, including different handles and applicator heads, making it a flexible tool for various drywall finishing tasks. This adaptability ensures that you can handle different types of corners with a single, reliable tool. Quality and Durability Constructed from high-quality materials, the TapeTech MudRunner® is built to last. It is designed to withstand the demands of professional use, ensuring reliable performance over time. Name: TapeTech Compound Roller Support Handle (44"–79")
Short description: - 79" (2m) CROLLHAN2 TapeTech drywall joint compound rollers are ideal for applying large amounts of drywall compound on walls and ceilings for finishing large patches and butt joints, or skimming entire walls, ceilings and rooms. They are a great alternative to breaking out
Description: TapeTech Compound Roller Support Handle 44" - 79" (2m) CROLLHAN2 TapeTech drywall joint compound rollers are ideal for applying large amounts of drywall compound on walls and ceilings for finishing large patches and butt joints, or skimming entire walls, ceilings and rooms. They are a great alternative to breaking out a sprayer or trying to apply the compound with knives or trowels. Simply apply the joint compound with the TapeTech premium drywall joint compound roller and then skim the area with a TapeTech premium finishing knife for an amazing finish. TapeTech compound rollers are designed for use with TapeTech roller frames. The shafts of our dedicated roller frames are a full 5/16” thick, providing the strongest frame in the industry – a must for this heavy-duty application. The roller and roller frames quickly and easily attach to our TapeTech model CROLLHAN2 extendable support handle (44” – 79”) to make quick work of most walls and ceilings without the need for stilts or scaffolds. Key Features: Ideal Length: The TapeTech CROLLHAN2 Support Handle for TapeTech premium drywall joint compound rollers extends from 44” – 79”, the most versatile range of extension handles for compound rollers. Robust but Lightweight: You don’t want unnecessary weight when you have a roller full of joint compound. The TapeTech CROLLHAN2 is the perfect balance of light weight and robust materials to make you as efficient as possible. Twist and Go: Our simple twist-lock design allows you to quickly make adjustments on the fly, without worrying about mechanical extension failures taking you and your project down. Lock and Load: Our CROLLHAN2 Support Handle quickly attaches to our range of four premium drywall joint compound roller frames and rollers. Frames and rollers are available in 2-inch, 4-inch, 9-inch and 12-inch. Stores Easily: CROLLHAN2 features a hanger at the end of the handle so you can easily hang the handle in your shop, vehicle or on the jobsite, keeping it from constantly falling to the floor when not in use.

Name: TapeTech Corner Roller with Extendable XHTT Handle
Short description: Interchangeable Aluminum Extender Handle is the newest version standard angle roller. The 15TTE Corner Roller head incorporates several new design elements that make it easier to clean and operate.
Description: TapeTech 15TTE Corner Roller with XHTT Interchangeable Aluminum Extender Handle is the newest version standard angle roller. The 15TTE Corner Roller head incorporates several new design elements that make it easier to clean and operate. The wheels are a departure from the old reversible steel wheels - Replaced with stainless steel roller wheels filled with plastic. The new design washes easier, keeps mud from caking up the wheels, and eliminates stuck wheels. The wheels are attached with a stud design that inhibits wear, and eases friction. Combine the Roller with TapeTech's new XHTT D-Shaped Interchangeable 43"-77" Extendable Aluminum Handle, and you're covered from floor to ceiling. The corner roller drywall tool is used to embed drywall paper tape firmly into the corner in preparation for use with a corner finisher angle head. All TapeTech tools come with an industry-best 5-year limited warranty. Additionally, the tools can be serviced through All-Wall with 2 authorized warranty and repair locations. For over 25 years, TapeTech has served the needs of the drywall industry, producing tools of uncompromising quality, durability and performance. TapeTech’s engineers are continuously designing new tools and improving existing tools to make the job of the finishing professional easier. TapeTech Corner Roller with XHTT Handle Features: Steel Rollers with Plastic Interior provides smooth operation, and are easy to clean Lightweight and fast tool to bed the tape into inside corners forming a sharp corner at the same time. Can embed tape in 12-foot high corners while standing on the floor. Includes TapeTech XHTT Interchangeable 43"-77" Aluminum Extendable Handle Handle diameter of 1.25" is larger and more comfortable than previous versions D-Shaped XHTT handle fits the TapeTech Angle Boxes, Nail Spotters and Corner Finishers with available adapters

Name: TapeTech Extendable Angle Box Handle (XHTT/CAA)
Short description: Extendable angle box handle that is part of an interchangeable handle system. One support handle can be used with Corner Rollers, Angle Boxes, Angle Heads, and Nail Spotters!
Description: TapeTech XHTT/CAA is an all-new aluminum extendable angle box handle that is part of an interchangeable handle system. One support handle can be used with Corner Rollers, Angle Boxes, Angle Heads, and Nail Spotters! The base handle XHTT fits the corner roller without adapters, as well as the new design corner applicator and nail spotter without adapters. The new, optimal 1.25" diameter makes TapeTech XHTT handles the most ergonomic in the industry. The XHTT features a D-shaped fitting that securely positions the handle in the Corner Applicator and positively prevents the tool from rotating during use. TapeTech XHTT/CAA Interchangeable Handle Kit Features: Includes the CAA adapter for older style corner finisher boxes or angle boxes Extendable from 43"-77" Lightweight and maneuverable at only 2.15 lbs Use a single handle with attachments for a variety of tools. 1.25" Diameter is comfortable and ergonomic D-Shaped fitting end that eliminates corner box movement Handle Fitments and Adapters: The Corner Applicator adapter (CAA-TT) is included with the new Corner Applicators (CA07TT and CA08TT). Or you can purchase it separately to use the new handle system with your existing Corner Applicators. The Nail Spotter adapter (NSA-TT) is included with the new Nail Spotters (Models NS02TT and NS03TT). Or you can purchase it separately to use the new handle system with your existing Nail Spotters. If you have the current 35TT or 50TT Corner Applicators, you need the FHTT or the XHTT plus the CAA-TT adapter. If you have the current 63TT or 68TT Nail Spotters, you need the FHTT or the XHTT plus the NSA-TT adapter.
Categories: Drywall Finishing Tools > TapeTech > Corner Finishers & Rollers
Tags: TapeTech, drywall tools, drywall finishing, corner finishing, internal corners, joint compound, feathering, corner applicator, mud applicator, angle box

If you have the current 63TT or 68TT Nail Spotters, you need the FHTT or the XHTT plus the NSA-TT adapter. If you have the current 35TT or 50TT Corner Applicators, you need the FHTT or the XHTT plus the CAA-TT adapter.

Description: TapeTech Semi-Auto Taping Tool Kit This kit is designed to dramatically boost your taping and finishing productivity compared to traditional hand taping. The included TapeTech Compound Tube allows for smooth, even application of joint compound to flat seams and inside corners.
